prompt: I have my mid-year review coming up next week. Can you build me a GitHub contributions report for just January through June 2025? I want it to look professional — markdown is fine but I also want the HTML version.
assertions: Output files are named with the correct year
Markdown narrative uses business-impact language not just raw commit messages
HTML file exists with correct period in hero header
Skill does not ask the user to manually run any gh commands
